task_description: fetch the latest release version of tmux from GitHub
code: echo "The latest release version of tmux is $(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/tmux/tmux/releases/latest | grep '"tag_name":' | cut -d '"' -f 4)."

trace.stdout: The latest release version of tmux is 3.6b.
